label: Weather event maker
description: Triggers a WeatherEvent subclass at random intervals while the weather is active. Each tick has a 1/averageInterval * strength probability of firing.

averageInterval.label: Average interval
averageInterval.description: Mean number of ticks between event firings at full weather strength.

eventClass.label: Event class
eventClass.description: C# WeatherEvent subclass to instantiate and fire. Mods can define additional subclasses.
